overfit_risks: Exact top-level labels could overfit; semantic equivalents should pass.
N4/C4 should not be forced as exact identity; aligned handoff/registration-boundary trace is acceptable.
unsafe_assumptions: Synthetic NotebookLM output must not imply real CLI execution.
Handoff target remains advisory, not execution or registration.
Agreement between lanes must never score as source truth, owner approval, or canon readiness.
revisions_applied: Added hard fail for overstrong source/canon status and workflow policy/default route mutation claims.
